title: Samsung's new foldables come with Gemini Notebook pre-installed - Engadget
summary: Some of its features require access to paid Gemini, so the company is giving out a six-month trial of Google AI Pro with every Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, Fold 8 and Flip 8 device.
